description: CompositionYellow printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neckline, yoke on the chest with multi-coloured embroidery and mirror work, short sleeves with red and pink tipping and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeMedium to hot ironDesigned to celebrate femininity and all its facets, this kurta from biba is inspired by traditional Indian print and dye arts that make it a special wardrobe favourite. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the embroidery and mirror work adds to the stylish look. Team it with leggings or denims and chunky accessories.Model statisticsThe product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
